nasb.text: Then Eliakim the son of Hilkiah, who was over the household, and Shebna the scribe, and Joah the son of Asaph, the recorder, came out to him.

esv.text: And there came out to him Eliakim the son of Hilkiah, who was over the household, and Shebna the secretary, and Joah the son of Asaph, the recorder.

cnv.text: 希勒家的兒子管家以利亞敬、書記舍伯那和亞薩的兒子史官約亞，都出來見他。

ccb.text: 希勒迦的儿子宫廷总管以利亚敬、书记舍伯那和亚萨的儿子史官约亚出来见亚述的将军。

csbs.text: 那时，希勒加的儿子宫廷总管以利亚敬，书记舍伯那，以及亚萨的儿子史官约亚，都出来到他那里。
